publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02830New York State College of Human Ecology Field Study Office records23-22-2830Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
April 20112B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
humecThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:26:44 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Human Ecology Field Study Office records
New York State College of Human Ecology. Field Study Office
23-22-2830
4.4 cubic feet. 4.4 cubic feet.
1970-1993. Financial Records, Printed Materials Annual reports, Field and International Study Program files, Field Study Committee minutes, long-range plans, grant proposals and logs, course listings, Five Year Plan, and International Educational Committee minutes. Collection material in English 2713092
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 2011
EAD encoding:
Daniel W. Young, April 2011
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, November 2015
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Annual reports, Field and International Study Program files, Field Study Committee minutes, long-range plans, grant proposals and logs, course listings, Five Year Plan, and International Educational Committee minutes. Parts of this collection used to make up collection #23-2-2704
SERIES LIST
Series I. History
Series II. Reports and Handbooks
Series III. Committees and Programs
Series IV. Proposals
Series V. Correspondence
Series VI. Course Material
Series VII. Subject Files
Series VIII. Awards
Cite As:
New York State College of Human Ecology Field Study Office records, #23-22-2830. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
RELATED MATERIALS
Includes material from former collection #23-2-2207.
Biographical / Historical
The Field Study Office was established in1972 and it put students. classroom learning into action, working with community agencies.
Foreign study. New York State College of Human Ecology. International Education Committee New York State College of Human Ecology. Field and International Study Program Cornell University -- : Students.
